item.title: Zelenskyy: No world leader has the right to negotiate with Putin on behalf of Ukraine
item.description: Zelenskyy stressed that Ukraine determines its own future, and no other nation or political leader has the right to dictate terms.

item.title: This Sounds Fun
item.description: alt text: Screenshot of a post by Trammell Hudson @th@v.st: @platypus my bank used to allow custom security questions, so I set one to "what are you wearing?" and the answer to "that's very inappropriate please transfer me to your manager". the first time an customer service rep encountered it they couldn't stop laughing and had to actually transfer to a coworker to complete the call. Dec 4, 2024 at 10:32 AM
item.dc:creator: davidaugust

item.title: The 'It is Wednesday my dudes' guy.
item.dc:creator: dizzyturtle

item.title: remembering Khaled Nabhan
item.description: Source: https://youtu.be/p05a2lIe3q8 Sheikh Khaled Nabhan was killed on Monday by an Israeli tank shell during a bombardment of the refugee camp in Nuseirat in the center of Gaza. His daughter and nephew announced this on social media, and Al-Adwan Hospital confirmed his death. Nabhan became known through a video on social media: He holds his lifeless granddaughter Reem in his arms, kisses her forehead goodbye and calls the three-year-old "soul of my soul". The phrase became a symbol of the pain experienced by Palestinians as a result of the Israeli bombings in the Middle East war.
item.dc:creator: IslamExplained

item.title: Circles on the rainbow bridge
item.description:
This was my 18 year old blind and deaf dog Nanna After 3 amazing years together she passed away in my arms this morning.
July of 2021 I brought her home as a hospice dog Nashville Humane thought she only had a few months left to live
She was a goddamn mess and even I thought she'd die within a couple weeks. I just wanted to show her all the love and all the fun she obviously missed out on the first 15 years
That whole first year together as Nanna got better and better I was still prepared for her to die any day I woke up every morning and the first thing I'd do is put my hand on her chest to see if she was still breathing
Despite the heart disease and a long list of health problems, I wanted to take Nanna everywhere Treat every fucking day like it was her last.
When Nanna got healthy and strong enough to walk, everything changed It was like the more miles she did - the happier and healthier she got She crushed a ton of 5ks and by the time she was 18 years old she was regularly doing 10ks with ease
We moved to Minnesota this year and started exploring as many bridges as we could Nanna loved the breeze on her face so much
And now Nanna crosses her final bridge without me.
When Mr Puckett died it broke me into a million fucking pieces All I could think about was how much time I wasted with him in my addiction and homelessness There was so much regret for all the days we spent apart, all the years I was blacked out instead of going on adventures with him
But I don't have a single regret with Nanna. I gave her the best 3.5 years of her entire life and as difficult as it was, I'd do the whole thing a million times over again. I gave her everything I had right up until the end.
We raised a lot of money for charities in Nanna's name over the last 3 years She was the face of fundraisers for domestic violence survivors, crisis foster organizations, humane associations and more
In Nanna's death I thought we could do one more amazing thing together to honor her life and help support other dogs looking for a 2nd lease on life So for one final time -
It would make me so happy if anyone who was able to donated 18$ in Nanna's name to the rescue I volunteer for Healing Hearts takes in dogs from all over the country and gives them a second chance to find happiness just like Nanna had.
The moment she died, surrounded by people and dogs who loved her deeply I thought about Mr Puckett standing on the other side of the rainbow bridge ready to take care of her. She's in good hands now.
Goodbye Nanna Pants, we all loved you so goddamn much. ... To donate to Healing Hearts in Nanna's name https://healingheartsrescue.org/donate/ Or https://www.amazon.com/hz/wishlist/ls/35V4LNUKMQJVT?ref=cm_sw_em_r_wl_dp_PMrUl9QY1uin8 ... Thank you all for loving her as much as I did.
item.dc:creator: MrPuckett

item.dc:creator: Lulabel73

item.title: Look up how many mass shooters have not been charged with this. Seriously.
item.description: I can think of dozens of mass shooters, nearly all of which clearly stated their crimes were (right wing) terrorism, who wrote extremely racist and/or misogynistic and/or homophobic/transphobic manifestos about what they were doing, and not one of them was charged with "terrorism". Edit: Just want to point out that this website is overrun with astroturf. As an experiment I posted this with no tags then added one after it reached about 180 upvotes. I then got 30 downvotes within a couple minutes. That is not a coincidence. That is a bunch of sock puppet accounts stalking the current events tab. I also notice the comment section is way more sane and reasonable under this post than it ever has been when I've used 'current events' or 'politics' tags. Edit2: Checked immediately after first edit and it's now over 60 downvotes since I added the tag. Not subtle guys. Edit3: Not only that but several comments have been downvoted 5-6 times while a comment that was in 'bad comments' 15 minutes ago rose to the top comment. I have been on imgur for years and that is not fucking normal. It does not happen without sockpuppets interfering. Watch this shit when it happens cause you're seeing in real time how these people jump in to control the narrative. Edit4: I know all of this sounds paranoid, but the change in the comments section since I added one tag is unlike anything I have ever seen on this website. Nearly all of the positive comments from before I added the tag have been systematically downvoted 20+ times. Nearly every negative comment from before I added the tag has been upvoted 20+ times. At the very least that suggests that people browsing current events specifically have *very* different opinions to the average user browsing user submitted, but I don't think that's enough to explain it. This happened very very quickly. It happened all at once, it targeted specific ideas to upvote and downvote. I find it hard to believe it's just a bunch of people acting independently when adding one tag transforms the entire comment section immediately. I mean ffs a comment that was once at -17 is now positive. That is fucking insane. I have literally never in 8+ years on this website seen a comment that deep in the bad comments climb back into positive and it's now at +15 and still rising. None of these users are leaving comments yet all of them are going through basically every comment and voting on all them the exact same way. What used to be the top comment, which at one point had 40 upvotes is now at 9 and still falling, while at the same time a comment that started in the red has risen to top comment. For a long time I've had a feeling that things like this are happening here and this post has proven to me that those concerns are valid. Parts of this website are clearly either overrun with astroturf, or extremely dominated by propagada and groupthink, or both. Edit5: Some of this has started to change since the post reached MV, which is refreshing. If you're seeing this long after all of that BS went down then sorry for the long rant, the first couple hours of this post were a rollercoaster.
item.dc:creator: Freyja33

item.title: Digitool's Massive Meme Cleanse Part #219
item.description:
Gonna be honest here
I just post this today because I want the attention
I guess I just feel a bit lonely
Crashing out doesn't help either
I like that people frequently like me posting
Makes me feel special or something
Makes me feel happy and gooey
So yeah that is usually my main reason for posting
I mean, it brings some happy to some people kinda
Makes me feel appreciated
Maybe a little selfish
But it is the truth
Doesn't everyone here post for selfish reasons?
Anyway, am really fucking tired
Weather was shit today
Very persistent drizzle
The kind that is not wet but does soak you
Really sucks
I also realised I haven't seen sun in 2 weeks
I want sun
I miss sun light
December is evil
I understand why Christmas became a thing
Because you need something in this misery
So yeah, done rambling
Have fun
Hope you like
Hope it gives me some points
Might post again soon
Reading the audio book while out lately, Peter Capaldi is a good voice actor, the BBC/Netflix show completely wasted him as Kehaar, his Kehaar in the audio book is amazing Also the book is amazing
Rat tax I was teasing Violet and Rose
item.dc:creator: DigiT00l

item.title: Spice Up Your Marriage
item.description: alt text: A parody graphic resembling a WikiHow article titled "How to Keep Your Husband Satisfied." It includes an illustration of a woman in a nurse's outfit and a caption that reads, "1. Dress Like a Nurse so he can live the ultimate fantasy of pretending he has healthcare."
item.dc:creator: davidaugust

item.title: Former FBI Informant Admits to Fabricating Claims Against President Biden and Hunter Biden
item.description:
https://usafocustoday.com/former-fbi-informant-admits-to-fabricating-claim/
https://usafocustoday.com/former-fbi-informant-admits-to-fabricating-claim/
CONTENT CONTROLS “Content Controls will allow you to see fewer posts from certain topics or tags while you browse Imgur.” https://help.imgur.com/hc/en-us/articles/26509094934171-Content-Controls HOW DO I MUTE OR BLOCK AN IMGUR USER? https://help.imgur.com/hc/en-us/articles/26508943104667-How-do-I-mute-or-block-a-user# BRIAN TYLER COHEN: FIGHTING THE GOOD FIGHT https://www.youtube.com/@briantylercohen https://bsky.app/profile/briantylercohen.bsky.social GLENN KIRSCHNER: FIGHTING THE GOOD FIGHT (JUSTICE MATTERS) https://www.youtube.com/@GlennKirschner2 https://bsky.app/profile/glennkirschner.bsky.social MARC ELIAS: FIGHTING THE GOOD FIGHT (DEMOCRACY DOCKET) https://www.youtube.com/c/DemocracyDocket https://bsky.app/profile/marcelias.bsky.social ANDREW TOBIAS: FIGHTING THE GOOD FIGHT https://andrewtobias.com ROBERT REICH: FIGHTING THE GOOD FIGHT https://www.youtube.com/@RBReich
item.dc:creator: oukid

item.title: Smacking around corporate media is everyone's duty
item.description: MV edit - I love you weirdos, thank you for making 2024 an amazing year for me. I hope it was cool for you too, on a personal level. My free book giveaway goes through the end of the month. I've given away 47 free stories so far , which means eight people picked out stories yesterday. I'd love to give away more, so click the link and go nuts. https://inkican.com/smashwords-scifi-short-stories-free-in-december/
item.dc:creator: inkican
